topic: Alphabet Q4 2025 APAC constant currency revenue
summary: Central estimate ~$18.8B, range $17.8-19.8B (80% CI). Based on Q4 2024 base of ~$16.0B and ~18% CC growth rate.
content:
Key data points:
- Q3 2025 APAC CC: $17.691B, +19.28% YoY
- Q3 2024 APAC reported (implied): $14.829B
- Q4 2024 APAC CC growth: ~9% (Campaign Asia)
- Q4 2024 APAC reported (adjusted from TTM): ~$16.0B
- Full year 2025 total revenue estimated ~$400B
- Q4/Q3 APAC ratio historically: 1.08-1.11 (declining trend)

Three approaches converge:
1. Growth approach (18% CC growth on $16.0B base): $18.88B
2. Sequential approach (Q4/Q3 ratio of 1.07 on $17.691B): $18.93B
3. Total company approach (17% of $111B total): $18.87B + CC adj

Monte Carlo simulation: median $18.83B, 10th-90th: $17.8-$19.8B
